subcodes.first_line: O beloved Friend! Your letter arrived and from its contents I received the great joy. There is no time
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز نامه شما رسید و از مضمون نهایت سرور حاصل گردید فرصت جواب مفصل
subcodes.subjects: @teachings as spirit of the age, @universality of the Cause, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
